name: resource-pressure
description: Identify nodes and pods under resource pressure (CPU/Memory)
query:
fields @timestamp, NodeName, PodName, Namespace, CpuUtilized, CpuReserved, MemoryUtilized, MemoryReserved
| filter CpuUtilized / CpuReserved * 100 > ${cpu_threshold_pct} OR MemoryUtilized / MemoryReserved * 100 > ${memory_threshold_pct}
| stats avg(CpuUtilized / CpuReserved * 100) as avg_cpu_pct, avg(MemoryUtilized / MemoryReserved * 100) as avg_mem_pct by PodName, Namespace
| sort avg_cpu_pct desc
| limit 15
